entities.name: AFLATOXINS

entities.description: Soilborne saprophytic fungus that infects agricultural commodities and produces aflatoxins

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Agricultural commodity susceptible to infection by Aspergillus flavus and aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Agricultural commodity susceptible to infection by Aspergillus flavus and aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: HUMANS
entities.description: Consumers of contaminated commodities whose health is adversely affected by aflatoxins

entities.description: Consumers of contaminated commodities whose health is adversely affected by aflatoxins

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in agricultural commodities causing health and economic losses

entities.name: HOST-PATHOGEN INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The biological and molecular interactions between a host crop and a pathogen

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: High-throughput biological technologies used to understand resistance mechanisms and pathways

entities.name: RESISTANCE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Crop factors and pathways that control aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: GENETIC BEHAVIOR
entities.description: The genetic patterns and inheritance associated with host-pathogen interactions

entities.name: MOLECULAR MECHANISMS
entities.description: The molecular processes involved in host-pathogen interactions during aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL BIOLOGY
